verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If my heart has grown cold, there Your love will unfold As You open my eyes to the work of Your hand When I'm blind to my way, there Your Spirit will pray /: As You open my eyes to the work of Your hand :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oceans will part, nations come At the whisper of Your call Hope will rise, glory shown In my life Your will be done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Present suffering may pass, Lord, Your mercy will last As You open my eyes to the work of Your hands And my heart will find praise, I'll delight in Your way /: As You open my eyes to the work of Your hand :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oceans will part, nations come At the whisper of Your call Hope will rise, glory shown In my life Your will be done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oceans will part, nations come At the whisper of Your call Hope will rise, glory shown In my life Your will be done, Your will be done Will be done, Your will be done

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: As You open my eyes To the work of Your hand Jesus open my eyes To the work of Your hand

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oceans will part, nations come At the whisper of Your call Hope will rise, glory shown In my life Your will be done

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oceans will part, nations come At the whisper of Your call Hope will rise, glory shown /: In my life Your will be done :/ 3x
